Speed TestToolsRankingsSecurity

Port Check

Browsers cannot open arbitrary TCP sockets safely, so this page gives a clear server-side probe checklist and common ports.

HTTP80 / 443
SSH22
DNS53

Checklist

  1. Confirm the service listens locally.
  2. Open firewall rules only for required source networks.
  3. Use your server logs to verify external connection attempts.
